description: Detects TypeScript type system bypasses: 'as' cast on untrusted data (req.body, JSON.parse), double cast (as X as Y), non-null assertion on untrusted sources. Simplified from Rust: flags all as_expression nodes (cannot check if the expression references an untrusted source like req.body or JSON.parse without #match? predicate support). All type assertions flagged -- higher false positive rate than Rust version.

flag.message: Type assertion (as expression) detected -- verify this cast is safe and not applied to untrusted data (req.body, JSON.parse results, user input)
